title: eriogonum codium
intro: Eriogonum codium, also known as Mormon tea, is a shrub-like plant native to North America, with a history of use in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Eriogonum codium are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mormon tea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health. Eriogonum codium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking a natural remedy for various health issues.
